title: Dense Dark Croatian Plum Parfait
description: A rich and fruity Croatian dessert featuring a mix of plums, tempering chocolate, and anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients, served in a mason jar. This parfait is perfect for a solo dinner or a special treat.
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together the sliced plums, honey, and cinnamon until well combined.
In a small saucepan, heat the almond milk over low heat until warm.
Add the chopped dark chocolate to the warm almond milk and stir until melted and smooth.
In a separate bowl, mix together the rolled oats, chopped walnuts, and turmeric.
In a mason jar, create a layer of the plum mixture, followed by a layer of the chocolate mixture, and then a layer of the oat mixture.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of the oat mixture on top.
Refrigerate the parfait for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
Serve the parfait chilled, garnished with additional sliced plums if desired.
